# edgenext_cdn_push (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `end_time` (String) End time, format: YYYY-MM-DD, used together with start_time
- `page_number` (String) Page number to retrieve, default 1
- `page_size` (String) Page size, default 50, range 1-500
- `start_time` (String) Start time, format: YYYY-MM-DD, used together with end_time
- `task_id` (String) Task ID for querying the refresh status of a specific task
- `url` (String) URL to query refresh status for

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `list` (List of Object) List of successfully submitted URLs (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--list))
- `total` (Number) Total number of records

<a id="nestedatt--list"></a>
### Nested Schema for `list`

Read-Only:

- `complete_time` (String)
- `create_time` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `url` (String)
